title: Cognizant TriZetto - Payer-Provider Transaction Infrastructure
problem: Payers and providers need efficient transaction processing, claims automation, and revenue cycle optimization.
solution: TriZetto Unify strategy for payer-provider collaboration. 4.4B annual payer-provider transactions managed. Facets platform for claims processing. Deep expertise in claims auto-adjudication, RCM, and patient access.
technology: Claims processing platforms, AI for claims automation, clearinghouse
ai_type: AI for claims automation, gen AI investment
traction_signals: 30%+ increase in claims auto-adjudication for clients
varden_fit: CRITICAL — Cognizant TriZetto IS the US payer-provider transaction infrastructure. 4.4B transactions annually proves the model. Europe has nothing equivalent.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Transaction processing is the most boring but most essential healthcare infrastructure. TriZetto's scale proves the model.
